name: shadcn-combobox
title: Combobox
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Combobox wrapper composed from the local Base UI Combobox primitive, local shadcn Button and Input class conventions, local class canonicalization, local SVG chevron/check/x icons, deterministic slot classes, and local static examples for basic, clear, grouped, input-group, multiple, disabled, invalid, popup, auto-highlight, custom item, and RTL variants.
